description: From the manufacturer Mercury | Stylish Indoor High Definition TV Aerial A stylish & Sleek indoor aerial designed to complement existing home devices and look great in any room of your home. Its unique omni-directional design easily receives all locally available Digital Freeview TV signals/channels. With a 1.5 metre coaxial lead attached, this provides flexibility in placement for the best possible signal reception. PRODUCT FEATURES: Premium looks with great results. Designed to complement existing home devices and decor Manufacturered specifically for digital reception - Receive Digital Terrestrial TV broadcasts with ease Unique omni-directional design that receives all locally available Freeview channels Simple plug and play setup and operation 1.5m RF (Coaxial ) lead allows for ideal placement away from nearby devices that may causing interference SPECIFICATION: Frequency range : UHF 470-862MHz Impedance 75 Ohms Gain 3-7 dB Cable : length 1.5m Dimensions 200 x 87 x 87mm Weight 375g
